chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 61 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. HERAING OF CASE 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 3550/2022 3.For hearing of main case. 22-05-2023 None present for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the applicant; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the applicant after filing instant Crl. Transfer Application has lost his interest. Hence, the same stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
